name: Incomplete Denylist to Cross-Site Scripting
description: The product employs a denylist-based defense against XSS attacks that fails to account for all attack variations. Due to the many ways browsers parse pages, a denylist cannot track all XSS payload variations, allowing bypasses.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node flows through TRANSFORM[denylist_filter] that uses incomplete pattern matching, then reaches EGRESS[html_output] where unfiltered XSS payloads can execute in the browser context
